calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-25-2022 Off Calendar

Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-05-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:
PLAINTIFF GABRIEL ESPINOZA'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

Grant. No opposition filed and the motion complies with the Health & Safety Code.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling.

Judge: Vedica Puri, Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/VP)
